hdea6137eg77a8g4659g9a57g6f1073b9b586: Mum, will you put the kettle on? I want to chat. Just us.
h7c2ce3beg1ffcg43efgaf50g276ee7f16b37: *Her condition looks familiar. Poison derived from a wild weed common to the Underdark.*
h94a79396g22eeg48f0g8662g6420f3be7c95: *Some local remedies could cure it - or an antidote likely held by the poisoner.*
h09cd3777g925cg48c9gaf82g11c5932e763a: You've been poisoned. You need help.
hebb78bccg0d18g4238g8443gb54e293b1a66: Aye. Poison. From one of your kin's blade.
hfcb9bccbgc158g49acg9ae6g4ad810806ecb: Aye. Poison off a duergar's blade.
h3cba54cdg187eg486cgb6cbg5a0908405769: Bad place to be stuck needing help. Just leave me. Please.
haa484008gfb86g4259ga54bgbaaff5c50a6b: How did you end up among the myconids?
h179847efg65d1g411dgacb2g8a31950392b3: Hold on - you're the one that robbed me. Did you free my kin as well...?
h77654b04g46b3g47f3g98ecg6dffab5cc971: I did. For that, you can settle what I'm owed.
h7e4628bdg2506g41d9g95e3g7ab7226d0676: I'll owe you by not gutting you for stealing from me. But if you helped my kin, well... that's more than most would do. Thanks.
h8d090818gd12fg4042ga4d0g5624eb1536a0: I have no idea what you mean.
h93cfe5ddg7910g4298g9f6cgb901eb15ce21: Well. You're lucky I'm in a good mood then. Normally anyone who stole from me would be due a knifing.
hd7c5b0e6g218bg4f4ega8ebg0f4138401199: Doesn't change what you did, thief. Come here.
h5a241b37g0071g4bcfgad35g883d5922f0fa: Ah... Gods... whatever that is... I needed it.
hbfcadf78g866ag47d1g8df2g97486ab53f99: You saved me... wait - did you free my kin as well...?
h6251f341g1c0cg40e3gb4a3gf04582f09e1e: I helped some gnomes escape the duergar, yes.
h1fdbcc20g3c50g450cgb9afg3f3d847524b7: Well... seems my prayers have been answered on both counts. I owe you. Me and my kin alike.
hc20cdf55gc719g4592g8c2dg69138ca7c922: Here, take these boots if you like. Not much for what you did, but it's something.
h7c360585gf47fg47c7gac86ge67a61471e58: Wish I had something to give you. Gratitude will have to suffice for now. Thank you.
h6574fa61gfc20g4241g8080g547797d8f0f7: I have no idea what you mean.
h976733c5gbc86g471ag888fg6cec5f42f170: Well... you still saved me, and you got my thanks for that.
hdec8a0f6g36b2g43b3g9ba4g063af6fc2e2d: Why're you helping me? You're one of them.
h91f59e9dg48f5g4bffgb88agacb5868d1111: Why're you helping me? You're a drow.
h4ce00c65gb714g4afeg8c5cg85ac7f496911: How could I pass by? You were in pain.
hbfd34f4dg067ag4f5dgb850g40040c19ba2d: No arguments there. Felt like a hook horror was sorting through my guts.
h76f23eb8g11e3g44a7gb8fag4c0a599b840c: But... ngh... that cure did the trick. Quick-sharp, too.
ha3c90757gabbdg42d3g8ebeg92b321cd8f79: I thank you for your help, but I gotta get moving - ah - maybe not right away...
h579ab35cg5b01g4012gb28bg564fcba4c682: *You recognise her boots - rare, magical items that greatly speeden the wearer.*
hb20ee47dg6cb3g4d0cg8d6eg4eda2f032dd9: Some of your lot - no offence - got hold of my kin. I need to help free 'em.
hbd05c489g13ffg4ff6gaecbgf99e56bb879e: Some greys got hold of my kin. I need to help free 'em.
hf9714516gdf0eg4723ga6ceg7c533cc58514: How did you come by those boots?
h506ffd98g32e9g4be2gaff6gf604de5e7a97: Took 'em off a grey on my way out of their camp.
hb6d17e71g41a3g4d12g8facga5d5bff23e9c: But I left my kin behind. I need to go back for 'em.
hd8e7f3e2gb932g45e1g8857g095e8b4a9f60: You want to help? I guess you could, but it won't be easy. You need to find a way to free my kin, my family.
h14dd8be8g5579g430fg8a09ge32e835eddd4: A whole bunch of us were exploring an old mine when we were captured by duergar.
h20f3a122g825dg4190gb4eage2601634685c: They hauled us across the Ebonlake, put us in chains and threw us to work shifting rock.
h8e73257egfd7fg4661gaec3gcff56482dce7: I escaped and wound up here, but the others are still across the lake. They won't last long - you need to save them.
h40d9a787g9542g4e2egb216g4d266e7952b8: I don't have much I can give you in return, but I'll be eternally grateful.
hcfbaee58g4b06g4ca0g9774gf0890a4fd863: Oh and you know what, I'll give you my boots. I'd join you, but I'm not well enough. I need some more rest.
hd1ef2060g7ab3g4449gbac8gf85fc910ab36: I'd join you, but I'm not well enough. I need some more rest.
h25a5c805gf81fg466dga960gef696f0f588b: What - you want to help? I guess you could, but it won't be easy. You need to find a way to free my kin, my family.
h4aa50797g5b65g4667g99e6g73fa200edb6f: You want to help? I guess you could, but it won't be easy. You need to find a way to free my kin, my family.
h691f07a6gd32cg41c8gb0e5g5510503a5cba: You kidding? I risked my life for these leather strips.
heed88d5bg956ag4102g8593g99cca807793a: I saved your life - you owe me.
h62479b15gbf5eg4bd9g8a74gce5dd0630694: You're not gonna let up, are you.
h76100947g29f3g4c3bga4e0g70d96a9a7b3f: I've been dealing with extortioners like you my whole life. My folks need me, and I need these boots.
h770f652bg4fffg4586g8e64gef896f27aac8: Your folks? What do you mean?
he3b0929ag4ad2g4598g91f9gdc91359e4dae: My family. Locals. They've been rounded up by your lot - put to work for that cult of the Absolute.
h2becd398gc821g4a17g8c8bg63ecaec5942f: My family. Locals. They've been rounded up by duergar - put to work for that cult they've all joined.
h74896fabg79dcg45e1gadd1g7a44bbf76d53: A whole bunch of us were exploring an old mine when those bastards jumped us.
h72d7deafga17eg4ba7gb6e5g4d76f4e42984: They hauled us across the Ebonlake, put us in chains and forced us to shift rock.
h25fc51c1g9c4ag4c3agb9b9g4e386df07456: I managed to escape, but I'll be damned if I'll leave the rest behind.
hf05929c9g74dfg4650g9e72gfef3c15c03df: Right. I'm going, then. My family needs me.
hbc03ccb0gb41dg4014g8f21gd70bc8e64b34: Ngh... in a second. In... just a second.
he0c9b0b5g709cg4df2g91bbg2e32e461b0ea: Are beat-up boots really worth dying over?
h13104317gc8feg48b0g9249gfa57d34a3e79: The enemy knows your tactics now - which means you have to change them.
h0bb247cfg22c9g4b87gbd42g3e7955e0dd7a: 'Course I mean to fight on - still breathing, aren't I? But aye - plenty ways to skin a slaver, I suppose.
hf8a74102gff91g4c95g8e60g6a74d76594f5: Here. Take 'em. I'll get along without 'em. One way or another.
h42d87cd3ga56bg4745g91ddg693d7398780d: Now leave me be. Last thing I need's a profiteer lurking about.
h453c7ee5g0a70g4e72gbb0dg851eb3ebc7b7: The boots are just a means. Your will is the true weapon.
h947b9664g4a9ag45a4g92e0g66befb48b4bc: Weren't anyone's will that tore my leg half-open. But... aye - reckon the slavers are wise to the boots now.
hc2835e22g34c4g4015gaa6fg44aa841ea1c5: Wasn't a question to begin with. My folks need me. And I need these boots.
hcd07b901g997dg4d70g8cdbg66a41e049e64: Off you go. But I'll be taking the boots.
h4c247595gb8acg4144g9d48gf838402602b8: And how are you planning to do that?
h5c2b69f7gfb39g4cf7gbeb3g99937c109232: Free your kin? What do you mean?
h8519ba9fg3021g4357ga919g6a806d48356f: My family. Locals. They've been rounded up by duergar and put to work.
h6fd69c8bgd373g4afag85bagcc02b76f03d3: Sounds like you barely escaped my kin. You'd better wise up and keep away.
h784dd3e6g30f1g48eag8fffge03b6c061738: You won't be able to do much going up against duergar.
had140764gd80eg4a49g8040geb7ef377b31f: I'm facing you, aren't I? Besides, my folk need me. No point in surviving just to die alone.
he8e46b58gfbf5g4ae4g9b4bgd7636aef463c: That won't save my folk. I'll just have to take my chances against your lot again.
h69c22b71g4313g40a6g9124gf59f863b25ae: Maybe not. Still gonna try. It's that or outlive everyone I know. Pretty easy choice.
h221c08a7g80fbg402dgbbf1gb9333f104ee9: Some greys got hold of my kin. I need to help free 'em.
h6f2331c4g4263g45dcg86e7g480554524ab1: I wanted to see what your life was worth to you.
h1ea8e3c8gb586g4325g9122gcf80ae97ad7c: Got nothing, m'afraid. Only have breath to draw owing to you.
h2cc91d28g2c92g423agad42g83d89e49171c: Does there have to be a reason?
ha24c1b8eg8701g4e02gb6eage552b7e7b1a1: Ngh. But I'm nearly good to get on my feet.
h7d0554edg304ag4c06gabd6g91968131fceb: It's always useful to be owed a favour.
hbf61ef38g37cfg460bg8634g3cd65d7c7aeb: Not from me, it ain't. Not now.
hf05f0bf0g8a19g4282g8a53gb01161dd4d00: Help? No. I just want to prolong your pain - at my hands.
hc277c556g3017g4c96gbd9fg247289bc9637: Should've known - you lot're cruel to the marrow. Well I ain't suffering you easily.
h7338664bg6154g4369ga5ddg4db5281f4e10: You were useless to me in that state.
h8ddfbbe7g0880g41c0g966cg0c41de26b4fe: Should've - ngh - known. I'll die before I go one step with you.
h01fc0cffg4a9cg4152gbcc4g5ddef3407a0a: I'm not really a drow - this is just a disguise.
h8695ca37g1479g43bdgba75ga01ebbb76f6b: You're faking at being a drow? In the Underdark? I'm not sure if that's genius or suicide.
hd3c5837bgcdd3g4cdag988agf665437ed62a: But appearances aside, glad you came along. I have to go - got kin who need me.
h915a36bag7e7cg427fgbd96gb6a0c35b0889: I'm not really a duergar - this is just a disguise.
h4c14543dgc035g4204g8135gb13666c2befd: You're faking at being a duergar? In the Underdark? I'm not sure if that's genius or suicide.
hee631b54gb608g4902g83a6g04b5acdf27c4: We're kin. If we don't help one another, who will?
h7c21bfb1gd5f1g4031ga637g58688dba8085: You're right. Got my own kin need helping, as soon as I'm on my feet.
h9fd4eaa2g185dg45c2g910dg6e701757d0f3: We're not all zealots - now you know.
hd9cf73cagb5e3g453bgb0c3gc54d5fc8b4fa: Oh, I see. You're one of those warlord types.
h2aece891gc151g48dfg8e12g28cf180a2d8d: No harm in a helping hand between Underdark folk.
h5bf7b36cgc94dg4936gaa42g2d889fcba3ab: You must have been away from here to think that. Not many willing to risk themselves for others right now.
h3a757ac4g24e0g44ecg9cacg7896c0fb50b7: Wounded creatures attract hungry creatures. We don't need that here.
h9b0ae464gd662g4a1dgadc4gab458cfbbc01: Wise. Glad to run into someone with survival at heart.
h2b33ede7g6289g4eb8g8303gdce981ab6505: Give her the Noblestalk as a cure.
hebe31046gc342g436bgb179g340fa9d7b97c: Eye her boots. They must be the ones Gekh wants.
h37083346gda68g402egb2a6g4b4c88d94f85: You're in a bad way. I could end your suffering, if you want.
h419b6bbag8f05g4a40gb2a9g8b69e0c7fcef: Ngh. Hard to breathe. Blood's on fire...
h9d73bcafg0690g43efgb6c8g812b528838ca: Can't give up. Others need me.
h8067f2e3g2376g4a58g9fcfg1ac686ecf6c1: She's helpless. Check if she has anything worth taking.
h6fcfea68g3d88g42c0ga23cg65b2d45b10b5: *Mostly junk, but her boots catch your eye.*
hcec5701agcf51g4d8eg8973gffe1e11c4338: She won't last long. Finish her off.
h383627deg743ag4c3bgb388gc78d24e92879: Damn thief. Just leave me be.
hb9eee0adge68ag4fcag9c0agb803e016a801: No need for me to ask how you fared - some of my kin have already made it here, safe and sound.
h665f049cg859fg4727ga696g1ea0426255c2: I hadn't dared to hope, but it seems I underestimated you.
h9d3e0503gc86eg4d70gad4cga04ddec4959a: Here's the boots, as promised. Best you head along, we'll be fine.
h76a9357eg19b5g4650gac01g04c9e7b1827f: And thank you. We won't forget what you've done for us.
hc8510831g1a3bg4eabg99fdg0600e3fa9e33: I owe you - me and all my kin. Thank you.
h7a8403dag3bb1g468aga95dgd266371d6c77: Taking care of those boots I hope? Fair trade for my life I s'pose.
h49afd1f7gc7e0g4784gac6cgaab80530d8b8: The duergar are all dead, but your kin didn't survive.
hcce72953g48a7g4824g917dg9e6680157b34: They're... they're dead? I'm alone? No...
h64dadcf8g3e7dg4410gb7bbga8f26aeae2ce: I should've been with them. Should've died with them. Leave me.
h8512ea5dg4b03g44cfg95fbgaaf5c28468a7: Remind me - how can I help?
ha2a17c98gd145g49e1ga77cga3edbcc726ef: Like I said, save my kin. And if you kill any greys along the way, you won't see tears from me.
h030de2bdgb68dg4db2g852fge393acfd90bc: Like I said, save my kin. And if you kill any duergar, you won't see tears from me.
he2ea7284g267dg4c1dg9e53g0e481793da17: Anything else I can do to help?
h88457d16gcea8g4746gb700g12946c161bdc: Your wound - what happened to you?
h6c51c176g5788g49bbg944fge3c4633a3a0b: Escaped a pack of duergar. Odd 'uns, talking of some new god. One stuck me with a poisoned blade.
h51554fbdg7087g4d76g9adagd2be7192c5eb: They have my kin, slaving away on the other side of the Ebonlake. Do what you can to save 'em.
h1ced9ef4gbf16g4844gb40fgbe3cda19bca1: And don't spare the slavers. They've dealt out plenty of suffering - time to return the favour.
h20894a18gbbedg4313g8370g1e54e54399bd: Have to get back as soon as I'm able though - they have my kin, slaving away on the other side of the Ebonlake.
h1d58a2d8g3988g4b22gbb6cg90b207e7b199: Have to save them 'fore they're worked into the grave, or sent to Moonrise Towers for who-knows-what.
h94ba4d0fga4c0g4c76gb302g0d8c878a8ad9: How long before you're fit to move?
h82955787g7184g45f6g8e3bg57aa0d3784e7: Don't know. Longer than I'd like. But a slow recovery's still a recovery.
h316ed113ga709g4c20g99afg06d105b65525: Reckon I'd be dead already if it weren't for you. My thanks.
h36ce0142g1a4eg40f5g9194gc15f8eed96de: If you really want to thank me, a reward would do nicely.
he6f18eb5g8119g49c9gb42eg9b9b3b19d335: Nothing - those duergar slavers take everything from you, then the work you into the grave.
h903d2d66g1015g4c59gbb7agcbbd96bcbfd1: All I've got is my life, thanks to you.
h1d8c7a82g851eg4b02g8435g42bcbd0fb0a5: If you want to show me your gratitude, your boots would do nicely.
h887ca194g3272g4a9eg8f43gd274fcd955b1: I told you already - help my kin, then I'll give you the boots.
h354c6fa9gd2ecg477bga977g7738886bcd49: I told you already. I need them.
h143bb68agbccbg4427g95f6g53ce76a5c134: Not happening. I need these boots to get back to my kin, help them.
h2aa6a576g95d7g4087ga683g16f1ecf47ee7: On the mend now, thanks to a stranger. Much longer and I'd have been with Earthcaller.
hcf95a837g1eacg4d49g9fc4g70f8e2341216: I'd be dead if it weren't for some passing stranger. Kindness is rare currency down here.
ha6150ee1g38f2g4d34gadc3gba63e95e6cf6: A little more rest and I'll be ready to get out of here.
